name: Chicken Braised with 40 Cloves of Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil and peel the garlic cloves.
2. If desired, skin the chicken pieces.
3. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
4. Place all ingredients in a deep, heavy pot that can be covered.
5. Combine everything thoroughly with your hands.
6. Seal the pot tightly with foil and place a cover over it.
7. Ensure the pot is well sealed so no juices or steam escape.
8. Bake for 1.5 hours without opening the pot.
9. Serve hot with crusty bread to mop up the juices and garlic. Enjoy the fragrance at the table.
